display_text: Vampire Fangs, Tier 2: Neutral item providing lifesteal bonuses for both attacks and spells. Grants +12/16/20% Lifesteal and +8/12/16% Spell Lifesteal based on the time of day (night/day/night-and-day). Provides sustain through both physical attacks and spell damage. Stats: Attack Lifesteal: 12%/16%/20%, Spell Lifesteal: 8%/12%/16%.
